description: Cross-CLI hook overlay (gh #55). The SSOT for events/matchers/timeouts is each plugin's hooks/hooks.json; this file only selects WHICH hooks each non-Claude CLI consumes, and in what order. Claude Code consumes the full hooks.json union via scripts/sync_hooks_to_live.py. Consumers: install-codex-hooks.sh (codex), harness-kimi/guard-check.sh (kimi), scripts/check_cross_cli_hooks.sh (drift test).

codex.note: Bash/PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit hooks only — Codex has no Read/Write/Edit tool names, so those matchers are excluded. event/matcher/timeout are looked up from the owning plugin's hooks.json. Order within an event is preserved in the generated TOML.

external.note: codex-only (deterministic rename + identity inject); intentionally NOT in hooks.json — Claude uses tmux_self_name.sh instead

kimi.note: Bash-command-string guards only (BASH_ENV interception, gh #52) — Kimi has no native hook API, so only PreToolUse/Bash-shaped hooks apply. insurance runs first and never blocks; gates deny with rc=2; hints go to stderr.
